decks.notes: This deck focuses on fast-paced aggression with a combination of white and blue cards. By utilizing powerful creatures like Starfield Shepherd and Sage of the Skies, along with support cards like Daydream and Floodfarm Verge, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck also includes cards like Erode and Abandoned Air Temple to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of flying creatures and card draw options, the deck aims to establish early board dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, utilizing the color combination of blue and red. The deck includes a mix of creatures with varying abilities and instant/sorcery spells to deal direct damage to the opponent's life total. By efficiently managing resources and maintaining steady aggression, this deck aims to quickly and decisively take control of the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Nova Hellkite provide additional utility and power to further pressure the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced aggressive strategy using UR (Blue/Red) cards. This is achieved through a combination of low-cost creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State, and tempo control through cards like Boomerang Basics and Get Out. By drawing cards with Opt and Sleight of Hand, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and pressure the opponent with quick damage from creatures and burn spells.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play using reanimation spells. The deck includes cards like Duress and Bitter Triumph for disruption, Restless Reef and Gloomlake Verge for mana fixing, and Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator as the reanimation targets. Additional cards like Stock Up and Superior Spider-Man help to enhance the reanimation strategy, while cards like Insatiable Avarice and Deadly Cover-Up provide additional utility and protection. The overall goal is to overwhelm the opponent with large, powerful creatures brought back from the graveyard.

Control the game by using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and creatures with valuable abilities to outvalue your opponent. Use your land base efficiently to generate mana and ensure you can cast your higher cost spells. Set up your board presence with mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and utilize powerful cards like Ba Sing Se and Tragedy Feaster to control the pace of the game. Manage your resources carefully and make strategic decisions based on the board state to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and creatures to quickly pressure the opponent and deal damage efficiently. By combining cards that can draw more cards and provide extra resources, along with evasive creatures that can chip away at the opponent's life total, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes some removal and disruption to clear the way for attacking creatures. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan and ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Superior Spider-Man to facilitate a combo strategy. By utilizing cards like Duress and Requiting Hex to disrupt your opponent's plans, while utilizing cards like Emeritus of Ideation and Stock Up to draw cards and set up your combo pieces. The deck also includes reanimation abilities such as Deceit and Bitter Triumph to bring back key creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk. The mana base is centered around dual lands to ensure consistent mana availability for your powerful combo plays.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board of low-cost creatures to overwhelm the opponent early in the game. By using cards like Springleaf Drum and Floodfarm Verge, the player can generate mana efficiently to cast a variety of creatures such as Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier. The goal is to maintain aggression while controlling the board with cards like Seam Rip and Erode. With powerful finishers like Starfield Shepherd and Aang, Swift Savior, this deck aims to secure victory before the opponent can mount a defense.

The Jeskai Control deck focuses on disruption and removal to control the game. It utilizes cards like Consult the Star Charts, Day of Judgment, Lightning Helix, and Jeskai Revelation to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Inevitable Defeat and No More Lies to further hinder the opponent's plays. Additionally, the deck includes mana fixing lands like Floodfarm Verge and Riverpyre Verge to ensure smooth mana production. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and instant spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm for removal and control, combined with creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Eddymurk Crab for damage and pressure, the goal is to keep the opponent on the defensive and end the game quickly. The addition of cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt helps with card selection and maintaining momentum. The deck aims to maintain control of the battlefield while dealing consistent damage to the opponent.

The deck focuses on using low-cost creatures and spells to apply constant pressure on the opponent, aiming to win quickly through aggressive plays. It utilizes a mix of creature buffs, direct damage spells, and card draw to maintain tempo and keep the pressure on. By efficiently utilizing mana and card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to establish their own game plan. The inclusion of counter spells and bounce effects adds versatility and disruption to the deck's strategy, enabling it to handle a variety of threats.

The main focus of this Golgari Control deck is to maintain board control through a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and efficient creatures. The deck includes key cards like Ba Sing Se, Duress, Maelstrom Pulse, and Witherbloom Charm to disrupt the opponent's strategy and keep them on the back foot. Utilizing powerful creatures like Emeritus of Abundance and Keen-Eyed Curator, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent while securing victory with cards like Requiting Hex and Tragedy Feaster. Overall, the deck aims to grind out wins through attrition and careful resource management.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using a combination of direct damage spells, efficient creatures, and card draw. The deck aims to control the board early on with removal spells and then play creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to pressure the opponent. The inclusion of Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Sleight of Hand helps maintain pressure and allows the player to draw into more threats. The deck also includes some utility spells like Boomerang Basics and Stock Up for versatility.

The primary focus of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of evasive creatures and disruptive spells. Utilizing cards like Sage of the Skies and Starfield Shepherd, the deck aims to apply pressure while maintaining control through cards like Erode and Seam Rip. By efficiently using cards like Springleaf Drum and Floodfarm Verge to ramp up, the deck can quickly flood the board with threats and outpace the opponent in a fast-paced 1 vs 1 match.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells to deal damage quickly. The key strategy is to control the board with cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Spell Pierce, while using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to pressure the opponent. By efficiently using mana and tempo, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Boomerang Basics and Get Out helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain momentum.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain a fast-paced and aggressive strategy using small creatures with flying abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Momo, Friendly Flier and Starfield Shepherd to continuously apply pressure while also using cards like Daydream and Get Lost to disrupt the opponent's plans. With cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Cosmogrand Zenith providing extra support and power, this deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and secure a swift victory.
